title: taraxacum patibuliferum
intro: Taraxacum patulubiferum, also known as the Pat's hawk's beard or false dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum patulubiferum include the potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Taraxacum patulubiferum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various health issues.
